scripts.validate:solution: EVAL_TARGET=$PWD/solution vitest run --config vitest.config.ts candidate/tests/public/public.test.ts candidate/tests/public/ui-state.test.tsx solution/tests/*.test.ts evaluator/tests_hidden/*.test.ts
scripts.validate: npm run validate:solution && npm run validate:candidate-main-expected-failure && npm run render && npm run check:render && npm run scan:safety && npm run validate:rendered-smoke && npm run validate:docker-integration
